nasb.text: The world is passing away, and also its lusts; but the one who does the will of God lives forever.

esv.text: And the world is passing away along with its desires, but whoever does the will of God abides forever.

cnv.text: 這世界和世上的私慾都要漸漸過去，但那遵行　神旨意的卻存到永遠。

ccb.text: 这世界和其中一切的私欲都要过去，但遵守上帝旨意的人永远长存。

csbs.text: 世界和属世的欲望正在消逝；但那遵行神旨意的，却永远长存。
